title: helianthemum formosum
intro: Helianthemum formosum, also known as the Chinese rockrose or rockrose, is a flowering plant species native to China. It is used in traditional Chinese medicine and is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving immune function. Helianthemum formosum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, and is also used in modern medicine in the form of capsules and tablets.
